title: Chuck Chicken
desc: Chuck Chicken, a clumsy bird-turned-hero, uses a magical feather to protect Rocky Perch Island. His comic battles against villains teach teamwork, courage, and responsibility.

title: Pokemon
desc: A Pokemon master journeys worldwide with friends, capturing and training pocket monsters while facing challenges and adventures along the way.

title: Ejen Ali
desc: Animated action-adventure following Ali, a teenage agent who takes on missions using advanced technology, courage, and intelligence to protect his world from hidden threats.

title: Mewtwo Strikes Back
desc: A powerful Pokemon faces identity and purpose while challenging trainers, leading to an emotional and action-packed journey about friendship, acceptance, and understanding.

title: Boboiboy
desc: A boy with superpowers splits into three elementals, joining friends Ying, Yaya, Gopal, and Fang. Together, they defend Earth from alien conquerors seeking domination.
